name: CMP_TCS_ITEM
description: Table holds Comp Tcs Item records.

columns.Name: ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: NAME
columns.Comments: NAME

columns.Name: SOURCE_CD
columns.Comments: indicates the type of source for the compensation item

columns.Name: SOURCE_KEY
columns.Comments: It is the key for the source table which is identified by the source_cd

columns.Name: DATA_TYPE_CD
columns.Comments: Compensation Type

columns.Name: ESTIMATED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if the value was an estimated value or an actual value

columns.Name: UOM
columns.Comments: When the source is Formula, it captures the currency

columns.Name: NNMNTRY_UOM
columns.Comments: If the souce is formula the non-monetary code is captured. If the source is of non-monetary type this attribute will hold a value which overrides the non-monetary code of the element entry.

columns.Name: ROUNDING_CD
columns.Comments: ROUNDING_CD

columns.Name: LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: SOURCE_KEY_CHAR1
columns.Comments: Record type of worker data from an external source

columns.Name: SOURCE_KEY_CHAR2
columns.Comments: Value column of worker data from an external source

columns.Name: SELECTION_CRITERIA
columns.Comments: Salary Scope for salary item source

columns.Name: STAT_CD
columns.Comments: Status of Compensation Items

columns.Name: PRORATION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Allows Proration of this Element Entry Item

columns.Name: CALC_EXPR
columns.Comments: Calculation Item Expression
